meaning: n.(花样滑冰中)后外钩点冰一周跳
examples: Mr Lutz said he would only return as head of global product development.
Lutz likes high-end clothing manufacturer Ports Design Ltd. as it provides exposure to the luxury-goods market.
Robert A. Lutz , colorful, influential and wise about cars, is an icon in Detroit.
Lutz also rejected Cunningham's and Black's choice of a fabricator to build the concept car.
